news_items.headline: MLB hands Cavalli, Contreras 7-game suspensions
news_items.summary: Cade Cavalli and Willson Contreras each have been suspended seven games for their roles in a benches-clearing brawl at Fenway Park on Tuesday night. Miles Mikolas received a five-game suspension, and Red Sox outfielder Nate Eaton got a three-game ban.

news_items.headline: Misiorowski's ASG status in doubt due to schedule
news_items.summary: Brewers ace Jacob Misiorowski is in line to start the Sunday before the All-Star break, which would make him ineligible to pitch in the All-Star Game two nights later.

news_items.headline: Rushing to catch Ohtani's start Friday vs. Padres
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani will be in the Dodgers' lineup when he makes his pitching start Friday, and catching him will be Dalton Rushing.

news_items.headline: M's Rodriguez exits after throw hits back of helme...
news_items.summary: Mariners center fielder Julio Rodriguez was removed from Thursday's 1-0 win over the Angels after being hit in the back of the helmet by a thrown ball and was placed in concussion protocol.

news_items.headline: Guardians stun White Sox on Rocchio's walkoff HR
news_items.summary: Brayan Rocchio hit a two-run homer in the bottom of the ninth inning that gave the Cleveland Guardians a 6-5 victory over the Chicago White Sox in the opener of a four-game series between the top two teams in the AL Central.

news_items.headline: Braves bring back IF Jarvis, designate 1B Tellez
news_items.summary: The Braves recalled infielder Jim Jarvis from Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday and designated veteran first baseman Rowdy Tellez for assignment.

news_items.headline: From Skubal to Peralta to Arraez: One player every...
news_items.summary: The deadline is a month away. Could players such as Tarik Skubal, Luis Arraez and Freddy Peralta finish the season on a different team?

news_items.headline: MLB Power Rankings: Rays, Marlins bring Florida he...
news_items.summary: Tampa Bay knocks New York out of the AL's top spot and Miami cracks the top 10 in Week 14.
